Package org.patternfly.component.label

Class LabelGroup

java.lang.Object
org.patternfly.component.BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>
org.patternfly.component.label.LabelGroup
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attachable, Container<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>, Finder<HTMLDivElement>, HasElement<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>, HasHTMLElement<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>, IsElement<HTMLDivElement>, TypedBuilder<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>, Component, Closeable<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>, HasValues<Label>
public class LabelGroup extends BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup> implements HasValues<Label>, Attachable, Closeable<HTMLDivElement,LabelGroup>
